body.title: profile.py — deep-merge inheritance with __replace__ marker (slice 5)
body.result: Profile inheritance shipped: load_profile resolves inherits chains; deep-merge dicts; lists child-replace; __replace__ sentinel for explicit override; cycle detection. 11 new tests. agent_datacenter 165→176 tests. commit a966485.
body.description:
load_profile() currently logs a WARNING when 'inherits' is non-empty but does no merging (slice 5 deferred). This ticket implements the merge: each parent in inherits is loaded recursively, deep-merged left-to-right (children override parents), and the child's keys layered on top. A literal {'__replace__': True, 'value': X} sentinel forces a wholesale replacement of a key rather than recursive merge — needed when a child wants to drop a parent's allowed_devices entirely instead of unioning. Cycle detection raises ProfileValidationError.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/profile.py (load_profile + new _merge helpers; remove the WARNING-only branch), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/tests/test_profile_inheritance.py (NEW)
**Design rules:** dicts deep-merge by default; lists in child REPLACE parent (no implicit union — too magical); __replace__ sentinel is the explicit override knob; cycle detection raises with the cycle path in the error.
**Scope boundary:** in — profile.load_profile resolves inherits chains, deep-merges dicts, child-replaces lists, honors __replace__ marker, detects cycles. Out — runtime profile reload (slice 3b inotify), CLI tooling for merge inspection, profile schema migration.
**Test plan:** test_no_inherits_unchanged (existing behavior preserved); test_single_parent_merge (child key overrides parent); test_dict_deep_merge (nested device_permissions merge cleanly); test_list_child_replaces_parent (allowed_devices in child wins outright); test_replace_marker_drops_parent_value (child uses {__replace__: True, value: []} to clear); test_chain_resolution_left_to_right (multiple parents in order); test_cycle_detection_raises; test_missing_parent_raises_profile_not_found.
